sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Loop Maneuver
special_mechanics.description: Special aerial maneuver performed by pressing buttons 1 and 2 simultaneously. Similar mechanic to 1942.

special_mechanics.name: Special Attacks (Energy-Based)
special_mechanics.description: Three separate special attacks usable during gameplay: Lightning Attack (air sections only, destroys small air targets instantly), Tsunami Attack (surface attacks, destroys small air targets and damages ships), Cyclone (destroys all enemy fire). Each uses energy from fuel meter.

special_mechanics.name: Fuel Meter System
special_mechanics.description: Player has one life represented as a fuel meter that constantly depletes during gameplay. Refillable by collecting power-ups. In 2-player mode, energy can be transferred between overlapping planes.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) document gameplay mechanics, weapons, items, and special abilities but contain no quantitative physics parameters such as speed values, acceleration rates, gravity constants, or sub-pixel positioning data. This is a shmup (shoot-em-up) rather than a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity physics are not applicable.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - 1943: The Battle of Midway (NES)
